privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to configure a Wazuh integration with VirusTotal using synthetically generated, explicit parameters (API key '9c3a5b8e2f1d4a7c6b0e9f8d7c5a3b1e4f2d6a8c0b9e7f5d3a1c4b6e8f0a2d74', group 'syscheck', level '7', format 'json'). The setup and validation scripts directly query and verify these exact strings against the /var/ossec/etc/ossec.conf configuration file located in the wazuh-wazuh.manager-1 Docker container.
